title: ST20 0AU, Belmont Farms Limited: environmental permit and partial surrender issued - EPR/BP3709LB/V003 and EPR/BP3709LB/S004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits and surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Belmont Farms Limited   Installation name: Wheaton Aston Farm Pig Unit   Permit number: EPR/BP3709LB/V003 and EPR/BP3709LB/S004   "
